rationale: Visual review at native resolution: faint but complete ridge flow across the distal joint. Low ridge_block_frac is low INK CONTRAST, not absent ridges. Retained as challenge per protocol rule on faded prints.

Lowest ridge_block_frac of any ROLL image in the dataset (0.0034). Visual review nonetheless shows a complete, legible rolled impression. This record is the clearest demonstration that the contrast statistic must not be used as an exclusion criterion. Retained as challenge.
